mapper.select: SELECT hb.*, ub.name FROM HOMPI_BOARD hb LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC ub ON hb.hompi_id = ub.user_id WHERE hb.hompi_id = ${param1} ORDER BY hb.insert_dt DESC LIMIT ${param2}, ${param3}
SELECT hb.*, ub.name FROM HOMPI_BOARD hb LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC ub ON hb.hompi_id = ub.user_id WHERE HOMPI_BOARD_ID = #{hompiBoardId}
